---
title: "Sir John Everett Millais 1st Bt."
---

## Sir John Everett Millais 1st Bt.

**Dates:** (1829-1896)

### Description

painter

### Biography

He married (1856) Euphemia Chalmers (Gray) Ruskin, whose marriage to John Ruskin had been annulled on grounds of non-consummation.  He was created 1st baronet in 1885.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 14th 1864
- Letter from Sept. 13 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
